ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings, credit card) */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name given to the account by the user */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the account */,
  "minimum_balance" REAL /* Minimum balance required for the account */,
  " overdraft_limit" REAL /* Overdraft limit for the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the transaction belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., income, expense) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., food, transportation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction */,
  "payee" TEXT /* Name of the payee */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "parent_category" TEXT /* Parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the budget */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the budget applies to */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated for the budget */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the budget (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name given to the goal */,
  "target_amount" REAL /* Target amount for the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "current_amount" REAL /* Current amount saved towards the goal */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress towards the goal (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal the progress belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the progress was updated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount contributed towards the goal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the progress update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., low balance, large transaction) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the investment */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount invested */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the investment was made */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Expected return rate of the investment */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the investment (e.g., low, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who paid the bill */,
  "bill_name" TEXT /* Name of the bill */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the bill */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the bill is due */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "auto_pay" INTEGER /* Whether the bill is set for auto-pay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security measure */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the security measure belongs to */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  "two_factor_auth" INTEGER /* Whether two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encryption" (
  "encryption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encryption method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the encryption method belongs to */,
  "encryption_method" TEXT /* Method of encryption used */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Key used for encryption */,
  "key_expiration" TEXT /* Date the encryption key expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encryption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encryption_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "credit_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the credit score belongs to */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the credit report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_performance" (
  "investment_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment performance update */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment the performance belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the performance was updated */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the investment */,
  "gain_loss" REAL /* Gain or loss of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_performance_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)
